reviews.review_title: Keeps crashing on S7 edge Nougat
reviews.review_description: I've heard good things about this but have yet to experience any VR. The app force closes back to occulus home once the title sequence finishes..!

developer_response.body: Hi there! The known bug on devices running the new Android 7 Nougat has been fixed with the new upgrade 1.23. Star Consult - KR Games

reviews.review_title: Cool, but could be a lot better!
reviews.review_description: I really enjoy the idea, but there's still a few bugs. I had to do the training five times to have it not crash on me, but it hasn't done that since. It's neat that you can sky dive during the day or night... but you can't see anything at night! I could barely tell where to land until I was almost in the water. If there was a way to move around a bit while falling without the parachute and a few graphical improvements on top of some bug fixes, totally 5 stars! I'd still recommend to try it out if you've got a couple bucks to spend and you've never been sky diving. Nothing close to the real thing, but a nice little gear vr taste:D
It crashes with my s8+ every time , I want my money back please

For a skydive sym not bad; but would be much better if dev cutts out the forced roll animation after jumping and the turn after standing up from the plane Seat. The sun reflections on the water should move and as a nice addition it will be immersive to watch out of a little window when plane lift off and that you can performe rools by yourself with the right stick or the new controller. Otherwise it has some good stuff!
